rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal's cost of living, tourism, or Iberian climate risks; World Cup is sports/culture noise.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Iran deal stalemate keeps mild indirect energy price uncertainty for Portugal, but no change from prior cycle; impact remains low.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight migrant journeys
top_events.summary: Pope's visit to Canary Islands highlights Atlantic migration routes relevant to Iberia's migration debate, but no direct policy impact on Portugal this cycle.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans: European defence autonomy debate
top_events.summary: EU defence industrial debate is a distant background story for Portugal with no immediate economic or security impact on daily life.
